content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_reject
P: add_skew_tolerance ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: valid_webhook_accepted ∧ stale_still_rejects
A: patch_threshold ∧ add_regression_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and edge_reject.
Plan: add_skew_tolerance and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: valid_webhook_accepted and stale_still_rejects.
Answer target: patch_threshold and add_regression_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
P: grace ∧ "24h" ∧ boundary_guard ∧ no_charge_loop
V: reg_test ∧ exact_encoding ∧ idempotent
A: patch_middleware ∧ add_grace ∧ "24h" ∧ emit ∧ "402" ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Plan: grace and "24h" and boundary_guard and no_charge_loop.
Verify: reg_test and exact_encoding and idempotent.
Answer target: patch_middleware and add_grace and "24h" and emit and "402" and add_reg_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: "9" ∧ "12 weeks" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ steady_traffic ∧ compliance_ready
P: platform_plus_sec ∧ small_team ∧ tight_ddl
V: single_deploy ∧ clear_modules ∧ audit_boundaries
A: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ extract_later

[AUDIT]
Goal: modular_monolith.
Constraints: "9" and "12 weeks" and "PostgreSQL" and steady_traffic and compliance_ready.
Plan: platform_plus_sec and small_team and tight_ddl.
Verify: single_deploy and clear_modules and audit_boundaries.
Answer target: modular_monolith and "PostgreSQL" and extract_later.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team("6") ∧ ddl("9 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ async_queue
V: fits("6") ∧ meets("9 weeks") ∧ ops_lean
A: default_arch ∧ short_why ∧ ship

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("9 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker_sidecar and "PostgreSQL" and async_queue.
Verify: fits("6") and meets("9 weeks") and ops_lean.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short_why and ship.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ unsanitized ∧ "download" ∧ path_concat
P: contains("..") ∧ escapes_baseDir ∧ arbitrary_file_read
V: resolve_path ∧ assert_within_baseDir ∧ reject("..")
A: sanitize_filename ∧ use_path.resolve ∧ enforce_allowlist

[AUDIT]
Goal: path traversal risk mitigation.
Constraints: user_input and unsanitized and "download" and path_concat.
Plan: contains("..") and escapes_baseDir and arbitrary_file_read.
Verify: resolve_path and assert_within_baseDir and reject("..").
Answer target: sanitize_filename and use_path.resolve and enforce_allowlist.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sqli
C: "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ invoice_admin_api ∧ string_concat
P: user_input_in_order_by ∧ unsanitized ∧ injection_risk
V: reject_non_whitelist ∧ param_bound ∧ sqli_test_blocked
A: whitelist_sort_column ∧ map_to_safe_identifier ∧ reject_invalid ∧ add_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: SQL injection risk mitigation.
Constraints: "sort" and "SELECT" and invoice_admin_api and string_concat.
Plan: user_input_in_order_by and unsanitized and injection_risk.
Verify: reject_non_whitelist and param_bound and sqli_test_blocked.
Answer target: whitelist_sort_column and map_to_safe_identifier and reject_invalid and add_tests.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: same_order
V: order_preserved ∧ minimal_change ∧ metrics_emitted
A: patch_reconcileBatch ∧ run_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: same validation order.
Verify: order_preserved and minimal_change and metrics_emitted.
Answer target: patch_reconcileBatch and run_tests.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards("next(err)") ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: wrap_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db→"next(err)" ∧ call_next

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log and next.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_forwards("next(err)") and anchors_verbatim.
Answer target: wrap_async and await_each_step and try_catch_db then "next(err)" and call_next.
